title: datura metel var. flaviflora
intro: Datura metel var. flaviflora is a variant of the Datura metel plant, also known as devil's trumpet or angel's trumpet, which is a flowering plant native to Asia and used in traditional medicine. This plant contains medicinal properties such as scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Datura metel var. flaviflora include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its use as a sedative and anxiolytic. Herbal preparations of Datura metel var. flaviflora include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are typically used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
